since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.70%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC -2.05% · Gold +0.56% · Nasdaq100 +1.09%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.70%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.70%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +23.76%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +23.76%, AMBA +11.54%, CEVA +6.80%, MRVL +6.39%, KLAC +6.19%. Laggards: DLR -5.08%, TTD -4.93%, EQIX -3.20%, PINS -2.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.15% at $164.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
